title: Trauma exposure documentation

examination.text: Requires full assessment of presenting mental-health problems and exclusion of physical causes before stress-specific management.
examination.rationale: Supports assessment before stress-specific recommendations for trauma exposure documentation; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Requires full assessment of presenting mental-health problems and exclusion of physical causes before stress-specific management.

source.title: Guidelines for the management of conditions specifically related to stress

medication.text: Defines acute traumatic stress through intrusion, avoidance, hyperarousal, and significant functional impairment after a potentially traumatic event and supports clinician-led psychological-first-aid or trauma-focused care documentation without medication invention.
medication.rationale: Supports assessment after a potentially traumatic event within the first month for trauma exposure documentation; no decision is generated.
medication.evidence_extract: Defines acute traumatic stress through intrusion, avoidance, hyperarousal, and significant functional impairment after a potentially traumatic event and supports clinician-led psychological-first-aid or trauma-focused care documentation without medication invention.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Event, timing, repeated exposure, immediate safety, injuries, dependants, symptoms, function, supports, mental state, risk, consent and plan remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for trauma exposure documentation.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
